description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms slightly extended outward. He is dressed in a short-sleeved, collared shirt that appears loose-fitting and tucked into a pair of straight-cut cargo pants. The figure's facial features are visible, with a full beard and short, neatly groomed hair. His footwear consists of sturdy, closed-toe shoes suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The clothing and overall appearance suggest a casual, everyday style typical of someone navigating city streets or public spaces. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's posture is relaxed and balanced.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing with arms slightly outstretched, wearing a collared shirt and cargo pants. He has a full beard, short hair, and sturdy shoes, with a relaxed, neutral posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, beard, collared shirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the drape of the shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and the figure's overall build.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, arm, and the fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt and straight-cut cargo pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
